summary: Iteration 13 - Backend API Testing for Cash Register and Driver Transfer Features. All 11 tests passed (100%). Fixed a bug where driver_name and driver_phone were not populated when creating an order with a driver_id.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - Login with valid credentials (200 OK)
POST /api/shifts/auto-open - Auto-open shift works correctly (200 OK)
POST /api/orders - Create order with correct total calculation (200 OK)
GET /api/cash-register/summary - Returns correct values (total_sales, cash_sales, total_orders NOT zeros)
POST /api/cash-register/close - Close cash register returns correct report
POST /api/orders/{order_id}/transfer-driver - Transfer order to another driver (200 OK)
GET /api/drivers?include_orders=true - Returns drivers with current_order populated
GET /api/orders/{order_id} - Returns order with driver_name and driver_phone
Driver transfer correctly updates old driver's current_order_id to null
Order response model includes all required fields

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: When creating an order with driver_id, driver_name and driver_phone were not populated
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added code to fetch driver info and populate driver_name and driver_phone fields when creating order with driver_id

critical_code_review_comments: Cash register summary correctly calculates total_sales, cash_sales, total_orders from orders linked to shift
Cash register close correctly returns report with all financial data
Driver transfer endpoint correctly updates order's driver_id, driver_name, driver_phone
Driver transfer correctly clears old driver's current_order_id and sets new driver's current_order_id
GET /api/drivers?include_orders=true correctly populates current_order for drivers with active orders
seed_data_creation: Created test orders during testing to verify cash register calculations

driver_transfer.status: Working - Updates order and both drivers correctly

drivers_with_orders.status: Working - Returns current_order for drivers with active orders

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 completed. All requested features are working correctly: 1) Cash register summary returns correct values (not zeros), 2) Cash register close returns complete report, 3) Driver transfer works correctly and updates both order and drivers, 4) Order creation now populates driver_name and driver_phone when driver_id is provided. Bug fix applied: driver_name and driver_phone are now populated when creating an order with a driver_id.
